about.content:
Senior DevOps Engineer specialising in platform engineering.

Multidisciplinary Platform Engineer with the versatility to operate across the entire platform lifecycle.

resume.content:
Senior DevOps Engineer specialising in platform engineering.

Multidisciplinary Platform Engineer with expertise across:
  - Infrastructure Platform Engineering (IPE)
  - DevEx Platform Engineering (DPE)
  - Security Platform Engineering (SPE)
  - Observability Platform Engineering (OPE)

Design and govern the Golden Path for scalable, secure, and reliable infrastructure.

skills.content: AWS, Azure, Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Linux, Platform Architecture, Python, Go, Bash, TypeScript

ipe.content:
Infrastructure Platform Engineer (IPE)

I define default resource configurations and maintain core foundations including servers, networks, and databases to ensure the entire platform remains scalable and efficient.

dpe.content:
DevEx Platform Engineer (DPE)

I focus on the human side of engineering by creating the tools, templates, and documentation required to streamline workflows and reduce cognitive load.

spe.content:
Security Platform Engineer (SPE)

I embed security directly into the heartbeat of the platform by governing automated policy checks and sign-offs to ensure robust and built-in protection.

ope.content:
Observability Platform Engineer (OPE)

I set the standards for reliability and monitoring whilst specialising in resource optimisation and the fine-tuning of production environments to maintain peak performance.

golden-path.content:
The Golden Path

By unifying the core pillars (IPE, DPE, SPE, OPE), I design and govern the Golden Path — a seamless and automated foundation that allows engineering teams to ship code rapidly within a reliable, optimised, and secure production environment.

degrees.content:
Maastricht University - MA in Globalisation and Development Studies
University of Manchester - BA in Business Management and Modern Languages
